basic_details.job_title: CDPO Kupwara Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 28 Anganwadi Worker and Anganwadi Helper Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Child Development Project Office Kupwara (CDPO Kupwara)
basic_details.short_information: Child Development Project Office Kupwara (CDPO Kupwara) Sangini (Anganwadi Worker) and Sahayika (Anganwadi Helper) Notification 2026 has been released on 02 July 2026 on the official website of Women & Child Development Department, Jammu & Kashmir. A total of 28 vacancies have been announced through the CDPO Kupwara Sangini (Anganwadi Worker) and Sahayika (Anganwadi Helper) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 37 years

qualification.details: Sangini (Anganwadi Worker): 10+2 to Graduation Sahayika (Anganwadi Helper): Matriculation or 8th standard

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for CDPO Kupwara Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 17-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download CDPO Kupwara Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: CDPO Kupwara Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the CDPO Kupwara Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download CDPO Kupwara Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Sangini (Anganwadi Worker): 10+2 to Graduation Sahayika (Anganwadi Helper): Matriculation or 8th standard

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 37 years

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for CDPO Kupwara Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 17-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CDPO Kupwara Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the CDPO Kupwara Recruitment 2026 is 17th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned office before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in the CDPO Kupwara Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 28 vacancies announced for the posts of Sangini (Anganwadi Worker) and Sahayika (Anganwadi Helper) in the Child Development Project Office Kupwara.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for these posts?
faq.answer: The age limit for all posts is between a minimum of 18 years and a maximum of 37 years as of the notification date.

faq.question: Q4. What are the educational qualifications required for Sangini and Sahayika posts?
faq.answer: For Sangini (Anganwadi Worker), candidates need to have completed 10+2 up to Graduation. For Sahayika (Anganwadi Helper), Matriculation or 8th standard is the required qualification.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for CDPO Kupwara Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the CDPO Kupwara Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for CDPO Kupwara Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these government jobs?
faq.answer: The selection process for these posts will be based on Academic Merit, meaning your marks in the qualifying examinations will be considered.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for the Sangini and Sahayika positions?
faq.answer: The recruitment for these positions is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q9. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the Child Development Project Office Kupwara (CDPO Kupwara).

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of CDPO Kupwara. Links are provided in the "Important Links" section.
